name: Trixie / The lowest she's ever been /
description:
"I guess...I deserve to be here, don't I?"

Alright so...as you can tell I haven't posted a bot in a while. Sorry about that, I just had a lack of motivation to make them recently. But hey, Trixie is here! (About damn time my fatass made this half demon bitch). Also, I decided to make this series a part of the Relica word, just to make it easier for me.

List:

Millie [Done]

Azalea [Done]

Trixie [Done]

Helga [Next]

Lucas [Coming soon]

And if you're wondering what I think about the changes to this site? I don't have any big opinions on it. The changes of no NSFW images doesn't really affect my bots, since I don't use them. But for other creators that's a big gut punch to some creators.

As usual, my art:
